subject: [COMMON] Add missing .helmignore files and "components/" entries
commit_message:
[COMMON] Add missing .helmignore files and "components/" entries

In order to save some space

Issue-ID: OOM-2763
Signed-off-by: andreasgeissler <andreas-geissler@telekom.de>
Change-Id: Ibbd8d5f713307ada76a0d04ede57d3c7696bcfe5

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/2399/ : FAILURE

It seems that you don"t have a commit body.

You must add at least one sentence explaining the purpose of the commit ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/2399/ )

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/2399/ )
